name: Outfox Health
notes: Health benefits answer engine. Engine Advocacy and Crunchbase both confirm San Francisco, CA.

name: Nextcoast Ventures
notes: Early-stage VC firm focused on US 'Next Coast' markets. Multiple sources confirm Austin, TX.

name: Freckle
notes: CRM data enrichment platform. Founded in Melbourne, Australia by Nathan Merzvinskis. Domain freckle.tech redirects to freckle.io. Foreign HQ — city/state left null.

name: Oxels
notes: Intelligent revenue orchestration for enterprise finance teams. Multiple sources list San Francisco, CA. Only 2 employees per RocketReach.

name: Zmo
notes: AI-generated fashion models / image generation platform. Primary HQ is Hangzhou, China per TechCrunch and Tracxn. US presence in Sacramento but not the HQ.

name: Zealvc
notes: Zeal Capital Partners — early-stage VC focused on fintech, health, and future-of-work. Multiple sources confirm Washington, DC.

name: Osmosis
notes: Automated fundraising research platform for hedge funds and credit managers. BizProfile lists Berkeley, CA for Osmosis Technologies Inc. Multiple Osmosis entities exist — matched by domain osmosis.fm.

name: Hookhub
notes: Marketplace for landowners to rent RV/trailer parking spaces. PitchBook and CEO's ZoomInfo location both point to Lakeside, AZ.

name: Leftlanecap
notes: Left Lane Capital — global VC firm investing in consumer internet/tech. Wikipedia and multiple sources confirm Brooklyn, NY HQ. $3.8B AUM.

name: Getfuelup
notes: FuelUp — mobile fuel delivery service for commercial fleets. PitchBook lists Salt Lake City, UT. Area code 801 (Utah) consistent with UT HQ.

name: Stillers
notes: All fields already present in input — no research needed.

name: Roccofridge
notes: Rocco — smart drinks fridge / home appliance. Founders and PitchBook confirm New York, NY. Featured on Shark Tank.
